2604.08213.title: EditCaption: Human-Aligned Instruction Synthesis for Image Editing via Supervised Fine-Tuning and Direct Preference Optimization
2604.08213.paper_summary: High-quality training triplets (source-target image pairs with precise editing instructions) are a critical bottleneck for scaling instruction-guided image editing models. Vision-language models (VLMs) are widely used for automated instruction synthesis, but we identify three systematic failure modes in image-pair settings: orientation inconsistency (e.g., left/right confusion), viewpoint ambiguity, and insufficient fine-grained attribute description. Human evaluation shows that over 47% of instructions from strong baseline VLMs contain critical errors unusable for downstream training. We propose EditCaption, a scalable two-stage post-training pipeline for VLM-based instruction synthesis. Stage 1 builds a 100K supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset by combining GLM automatic annotation, EditScore-based filtering, and human refinement for spatial, directional, and attribute-level accuracy. Stage 2 collects 10K human preference pairs targeting the three failure modes and applies direct preference optimization (DPO) for alignment beyond SFT alone. On Eval-400, ByteMorph-Bench, and HQ-Edit, fine-tuned Qwen3-VL models outperform open-source baselines; the 235B model reaches 4.712 on Eval-400 (vs. Gemini-3-Pro 4.706, GPT-4.1 4.220, Kimi-K2.5 4.111) and 4.588 on ByteMorph-Bench (vs. Gemini-3-Pro 4.522, GPT-4.1 3.412). Human evaluation shows critical errors falling from 47.75% to 23% and correctness rising from 41.75% to 66%. The work offers a practical path to scalable, human-aligned instruction synthesis for image editing data.
2604.08213.paper_summary_zh: 高品質的訓練三元組（來源-目標圖像對及精確的編輯指令）是擴展指導性圖像編輯模型的一個關鍵瓶頸。視覺語言模型（VLMs）被廣泛用於自動化指令合成，但我們在圖像對設置中識別出三種系統性失效模式：方向不一致（例如，左右混淆）、視角模糊和不足的細粒度屬性描述。人類評估顯示，超過47%的強基線VLMs的指令包含關鍵錯誤，無法用於下游訓練。我們提出了EditCaption，一個可擴展的兩階段後訓練管道，用於基於VLM的指令合成。第一階段通過結合GLM自動註釋、基於EditScore的過濾和人類精煉，建立了一個10萬的監督微調（SFT）數據集，以提高空間、方向和屬性層級的準確性。第二階段收集了10,000對針對三種失效模式的人類偏好對，並應用直接偏好優化（DPO）以實現超越僅SFT的對齊。在Eval-400、ByteMorph-Bench和HQ-Edit上，微調的Qwen3-VL模型超越了開源基線；235B模型在Eval-400上達到4.712（對比Gemini-3-Pro 4.706，GPT-4.1 4.220，Kimi-K2.5 4.111），在ByteMorph-Bench上達到4.588（對比Gemini-3-Pro 4.522，GPT-4.1 3.412）。人類評估顯示關鍵錯誤從47.75%降至23%，正確率從41.75%上升至66%。這項工作為可擴展的人類對齊指令合成提供了一條實用的途徑，以用於圖像編輯數據。
2604.08213.author: Xiangyuan Wang et.al.
2604.08213.authors: Xiangyuan Wang, Honghao Cai, Yunhao Bai, Tianze Zhou, Haohua Chen, Yao Hu, Xu Tang, Yibo Chen, Wei Zhu
